data.label: Flutter Geolocator Plugin
data.description: 一个 Flutter 地理定位插件，可便捷访问平台特定的位置服务（Android 上为 FusedLocationProviderClient，若不可用则为 LocationManager；iOS 上为 CLLocationManager）

data.label: Flutter Geolocator Plugin
data.description: A Flutter geolocation plugin which provides easy access to platform specific location services (FusedLocationProviderClient, or if not available the LocationManager on Android and CLLocationManager on iOS)
